title: Include attachments when an item is created in another board from an automations
excerpt:
It would be great if when an item is created in another board once an automation is triggered, any attachments on the original item go with the new item created, is that possible? 
Thanks! 
Terrie  :smiley:

posts.author: Terrie (Terrie Schwerin)
